sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45206" key="eu)sukofa/nthtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσῡκοφάντητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exposed to calumny</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.707f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
